title: Bedrock Combat
description: Removes Attack Cooldowns from Tools & Weapons, creating parity with Bedrock Edition
body:
**⚠️ This data pack requires the server-side mod [Item Components](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components) ⚠️**

# ⚔️ Bedrock Combat
- **Removes Attack Speed** by upping it to a value that it becomes negligible
- **Changed damage values** to match those of [Bedrock Edition](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Damage#Dealing_damage:~:text=Bedrock%20Edition:)
- **Compatible with vanilla clients**, without any disparity
